Class ByteVariable

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Number
net.fokinatorr.sparkle.variable.ByteVariable
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Variable<Byte>
public class ByteVariable extends Number implements Variable<Byte>
A variable storing a byte value.
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ByteVariable()
    Creates a new ByteVariable with initial value 0.
    ByteVariable(byte initialValue)
    Creates a new ByteVariable with the given initial value.

    • is

      public boolean is(Class<?> cls)
      Returns whether the current value of this variable can be exactly represented as the class represented by the given Class object. Primitive classes should also be accepted.
      Specified by:
      is in interface Variable<Byte>
      Parameters:
      cls - the class
      Returns:
      true if the current value is an instance of the given class, false otherwise

    • copy

      public ByteVariable copy()
      Creates and returns a shallow copy of this variable. The copy should not reflect changes to the source Variable, however, the value's state may be shared.
      Specified by:
      copy in interface Variable<Byte>
      Returns:
      a copy of this variable
